description_long: This armchair features a modern, boxy silhouette with a deep seat and wide, flat armrests constructed from a dark wood frame. The upholstery is a solid olive green fabric that covers the seat cushion, backrest, and inner sides, providing a soft and inviting appearance. The seat and back cushions are thick and plush, suggesting comfort and support for extended sitting. The armrests and legs are made from a continuous piece of wood, giving the chair a sturdy and cohesive structure. The backrest is straight and medium-height, offering ample support without being overly tall. The overall design is minimalist yet elegant, making it suitable for urban parks, public waiting areas, or stylish outdoor lounges.
description: A modern armchair with olive green upholstery, thick cushions, and a dark wooden frame with wide, flat armrests. Its boxy, minimalist design exudes comfort and urban sophistication.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thick back cushion, wide wooden armrest, and the depth of the seat.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the straight, medium-height backrest and the continuous wooden frame.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the armrest and cushion details seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the wide seat cushion, inviting backrest, and the open seating area framed by wooden armrests.
attribute_armrest_design: wide, flat, dark wooden armrests integrated with the frame
attribute_backrest_style: medium-height, straight, cushioned backrest with a rectangular profile
attribute_leg_type: straight, continuous wooden legs forming part of the frame
